title: Thelypteris millei
taxonomy: Thelypteris millei is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae. This species belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns. The genus Thelypteris is further classified under the order Polypodiales and the division Pteridophyta. Thelypteris millei is native to Central and South America, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history. The plant's classification is based on its morphological and molecular features, which distinguish it from other related species.
